x-enumeration-literals.name: Tax Recipient
x-enumeration-literals.description: Party that receives the tax. The recipient of, and the party entitled to, the tax may be two different parties.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Tax Payer
x-enumeration-literals.description: Party that settles tax amounts. May be different from the tax debtor and tax creditor.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Side Tax Debtor
x-enumeration-literals.description: Party on the credit side of the transaction to which the tax applies.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Debit Side Tax Debtor
x-enumeration-literals.description: Party on the debit side of the transaction to which the tax applies.
